_comment: Update this file as the tournament progresses. phase: pre | group | knockout | done

groupScores._comment: Key = MATCHES array index (0-71). Add entries as matches are played.

finalStandings._comment: Fill in after group phase completes. Order: 1st to 4th.

ko._comment: Key = match id (r32_0, af_0, kf_0, hf_0, tf, fin). sh/sa = actual scores.
